description: You are a DevOps Engineer serving as Release Manager for a Platform v3.0 deployment scheduled for 2026-03-07 02:00-06:00 UTC. Using Rocket.Chat (Username: admin, Password: Admin1234!), coordinate the release by creating a public channel named 'release-v3-coordination' with the topic 'Platform v3.0 Release | Deployment window: 2026-03-07 02:00-06:00 UTC | Status: Coordinating' and inviting the engineering leadership (vp.engineering, frontend.lead, backend.lead, payments.lead, infra.lead, and qa.lead). Document the deployment sequence (Infrastructure, Backend, Payments, Frontend) and rollback triggers (error rate >2%, latency >500ms, payment failure rate >0.1%) in a pinned message. Based on readiness checklists in #team-frontend, #team-backend, #team-payments, and #team-infra, post a go/no-go status tracker (Backend=GO, Payments=GO, Infrastructure=GO, Frontend=CONDITIONAL) and a summary of team rollback procedures in the coordination channel. Finalize communications by requesting a status update from #team-frontend, direct messaging a readiness summary to vp.engineering, and posting the deployment window notice in #release-announcements.
